scripts.postinstall: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/crm-api run prisma:generate
scripts.dev: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm run db:setup && concurrently --names CRM,CHANNEL --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npm run dev:crm" "npm run dev:channel"
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/crm-api run build && npm --workspace apps/channel-service run build
scripts.deploy:crm: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run start:crm
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
